name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: Help needed >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74c6/24c69fd9/8a0e556/18ed697a/2681991378/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW04N_digital_email_20161102_OurMoment_n-all&source=WPEFEW04N_digital_email_20161102_OurMoment_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

We are less than a week from doing something that no one in the history of this country has ever done before -- electing a woman as president.

All our hard work has brought us to this moment. And not just what we've done in the last year and a half, but the last 31 years at EMILY's List.

It's the hard work of Ellen Malcolm and the founding members who started this organization, of the hundreds of thousands of women and men who have donated to EMILY's List and our candidates, of every EMILY's List member who asked a candidate to run, of every woman who boldly put her name on the ballot, and of you.

We've been building to this moment. And we are so incredibly close.

But we're not there yet. And it would go against every campaign lesson we've learned to get complacent now or think we have it in the bag.

**So I'm asking you, before Election Day is here, to help finish the work that started over 30 years ago. Make a $3 donation right now:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/This-Is-Our-Moment](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74c6/24c69fd9/8a0e556/18ed697b/2681991378/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161102_email_OurMoment?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgThisIsOurMoment&utm_campaign=WPEFEW04N_digital_email_20161102_OurMoment_n-all&source=WPEFEW04N_digital_email_20161102_OurMoment_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74c6/24c69fd9/8a0e556/18ed6974/2681991378/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161102_email_OurMoment?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WPEFEW04N_digital_email_20161102_OurMoment_n-all&source=WPEFEW04N_digital_email_20161102_OurMoment_n-all")

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74c6/24c69fd9/8a0e556/18ed6976/2681991378/VEsD/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEW04N_digital_email_20161102_OurMoment_n-all&source=WPEFEW04N_digital_email_20161102_OurMoment_n-all"). name: catherine@dscc.org
subject: just ran the numbers (TIMELY)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I've run the numbers, and there is no way that we are going to hit our latest goal without your immediate grassroots support... Deep breaths, Friend. I just got this note from our Executive Director and I need you to see it.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161102-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend, you need to see this note from our Executive Director....
_" Can you find an additional $263,000 in the next 48 hours? The McConnell cash surge is threatening our path to victory. We have a strategy we need to implement, but we need the cash to do it ASAP."_ \-- Tom I've run the numbers, Friend, and there is no way that we are going to hit this goal without your immediate support. [**Please, can you pitch in $1 or whatever you can right now to help?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161102-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Here's the deal: There are SIX tied Senate races. Mitch McConnell's cash cavalry has been blanketing the states with dark money. And without your help, we'll just be standing by, waiting to see if the GOP's cash has moved the polls.

**So please, with everything on the line, can you pitch in a gift right now and help make sure our campaigns have what they need to win?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161102-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161102-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161102-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161102-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

The margins on all of our races are so close, Friend. **Some are projected to be won by as little as half a percent. For real. **

[**I want so badly to tell Tom that we will have the funds he needs to help our campaigns. Can I count on you to rush a gift of $1 or whatever you can right now?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161102-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc60/2a380d31/14ecbb57/ff6a0d/733340453/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc60/2a380d31/14ecbb57/ff6a0e/733340453/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAyXzExMDEtMXdlZWszLU5PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161102_1101-1week3-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
We won't sugarcoat this, team: If the election were held today, Governor Hassan would LOSE our race for Senate control.
**The ONLY way to prevent that from happening and pull ahead is to keep up our fundraising momentum all the way through Election Day. And right now, we're coming up short.**
[**Please, give $3 or more now so that we can lock in our final ad buys, reach more voters, and swing the polls in Maggie's favor. That's the only way we can take back the Senate and secure the future of the Supreme Court.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc60/2a380d31/14ecbb57/ff6a0e/733340453/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAyXzExMDEtMXdlZWszLU5PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161102_1101-1week3-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

body:
I’ve got a plan for my first 100 days in office. Here’s how you can join my team. |

Friend, Election Day is just 5 days away. We’re closing strong, and we can’t let up. That’s why it’s so important that we get every single supporter on board. We’re taking on the entire rigged system, and it’s now or never. Our country’s future is on the line. With your help, I know we’ll win next Tuesday – JOIN TEAM TRUMP TODAY. When we do, we’re going to get to work immediately laying the groundwork to Make America Great Again. You’re going to have a real voice again in Washington. Join with an EMERGENCY contribution today to help us put more ads on the air and get out the vote for Trump-Pence. CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT I recently unveiled my “Contract with the American Voter” – my plan for my first 100 days in office to end the rigged system, revitalize our economy and protect our country and our people. I’ve included details below. I will bring honesty and accountability to Washington, so we can get big things done and hold those who’ve ripped us off accountable. But I need your help. Believe me, the career politicians and their cronies didn’t think it could ever happen... and they are scared. They will do anything to defeat me next Tuesday – and that’s why I need you on my campaign team. So JOIN TEAM TRUMP today with an emergency contribution. Help me win this historic race and get to work for you in the White House. CONTRIBUTE NOW Here are the ten key areas I will focus on when I am sworn into office on January 20, 2017: Passing middle class tax relief and tax simplification Enacting trade tariffs to discourage offshoring of American jobs Expanding energy production, which will spur $1 trillion in infrastructure investment Providing greater school choice options to families and improving higher education Repealing Obamacare and fixing our nation’s health insurance system Making childcare and eldercare more affordable Ending illegal immigration Tackling crime, drugs and violence to fix America’s hardest-hit cities and neighborhoods Restoring our military strength, protecting our national security and taking care of our veterans Enacting powerful ethics reform to drain the swamp in Washington Help me WIN next Tuesday to Make America Great Again! We can’t leave anything on the table. We don’t want to wake up November 9th wondering what more we could have done. Thank you for joining Team Trump at this critical time. Best wishes, Donald J. Trump P.S. Every bit of support will help us win over another voter, or get a voter to the polls on Election Day. And that’s how we’ll WIN this race. Join Team Trump. CONTRIBUTE NOW

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

---|---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**November 3, 2016**

**Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**PHIL SCOTT LAYS OUT HIS VISION FOR A BRIGHTER FUTURE AND STRONGER ECONOMY IN NEW AD**
**Middlesex, Vt., November 3, 2016 –** On the heels of his “Even Better” video released Tuesday, Phil Scott, candidate for Governor, today released a new ad highlighting his vision for building an economy that benefits all Vermonters. The 30-second ad is titled “The Vermont I see.”

“Let’s prioritize what’s really important to Vermont --the affordability of Vermont. The economy is important to each and every one of us,” says Scott. “We need to create an environment that’s conducive to growth, so that people can succeed and businesses can prosper.”

Scott is the only candidate for Governor who has made the economy and affordability the focus of his campaign, and who has committed to making those issues his priorities as Governor. Throughout the campaign Scott has advanced specific proposals to drive economic growth, make Vermont more affordable, address our health and safety challenges, and restore faith and trust in Government. You can view those proposals at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=20dbc3be26&e=19cebfe173).

“A brighter future for our families and our kids. A growing, thriving economy will lift all boats and everyone will benefit. That’s the Vermont I see, and I’d be honored to have your vote for Governor,” Scott concludes.

###
Watch the full ad here:

name: McGinty HQ
subject: “most likely to flip” (NPR)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7474933194735747072/4786226892267061248?refcode=e20161103.2&refcode2=e20161103.2nd&amount=25)
---
Hard to believe -- five days left. Things are moving incredibly fast:

* _NPR_ has moved Katie's race up in their **_" most likely to flip"_** rankings -- it's now #3!

* But we just got word that Republicans are dumping a last-minute _**$10 million**_ into TV ads.

* Here's the scary part: A whopping 16 percent of Pennsylvania voters are still undecided. **_WE HAVE TO REACH THEM._**

Hurry, we have just five days to mount the biggest GOTV effort in Pennsylvania history and make sure voters tip the scales for Katie. [**We can 't do it without you -- will you chip in $5 right away? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7474933194735747072/4786226892267061248?refcode=e20161103.2&refcode2=e20161103.2nd&amount=25)

**[Quick, chip in now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7474933194735747072/4786226892267061248?refcode=e20161103.2&refcode2=e20161103.2nd&amount=25)**
Republican strategists are admitting that Pennsylvania is KEY to their hopes of keeping the Senate. The ultra-right-wing Club for Growth (of which Pat Toomey was once PRESIDENT) says: **" If Republicans can keep Toomey there, it's almost impossible for Democrats to win the seats they need to take back the majority."**

The _entire country_ is counting on us, friends. Don't let them down. Don't let Pennsylvania down. [**Pitch in $5 or more immediately to stop Pat Toomey, elect Katie, and take back the Senate for Democrats. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7474933194735747072/4786226892267061248?refcode=e20161103.2&refcode2=e20161103.2nd&amount=25)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/final-sprint**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7474933194735747072/4786226892267061248?refcode=e20161103.2&refcode2=e20161103.2nd&amount=25)

Let's go,

Team Katie

But we just got word that Republicans are dumping a last-minute $10 million into TV ads. Here's the scary part: A whopping 16 percent of Pennsylvania voters are still undecided. name: Ben Carson
subject: This is the last time
body:
Peter,

Nearly every Thursday since May, I have emailed you on behalf of
My Faith Votes, where I've been serving as Honorary National
Chairman.

I've explained their mission of motivating the 25 million
Christians who did not vote in 2012 to get to the polls on
November 8th.

I've shared some of their TV and radio PSA's, as well as their
extremely impressive plan to reach and turn out millennial
students from Christian colleges and universities.

They've made tremendous strides and I am very proud of their work
-- work which you and thousands of others have made possible
through your participation and financial support.

And now we come to today -- the last Thursday before Election
Day.

Today is the last time I will email you before November 8th
asking for your financial help, and I strongly urge you to make
one final tax-deductible donation to My Faith Votes now.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=101

It really all comes down to the next few days, and as you have
probably seen from the public polling, things are very fluid. You
may already have decided to vote, but there are many out there
who are still weighing their options.

My Faith Votes is working hard right up to Election Day. They
have five more national events scheduled this week. They are
tripling their airtime on Christian radio and launching a new
video campaign on social media.

But My Faith Votes will only be able to fulfill its mission with
your continued support, and it's needed now more than ever.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=101

Thank you for all you've done. It's an honor to count you as a
supporter, and I'm extremely optimistic about the impact that we
can have together.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Donate:
myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=101

Copyright © 2016 MyFaithVotes, All rights
reserved

MyFaithVotes | PO Box 1340 | Merrifield, VA
22116

Friend,

_**In just 5 days, the election will be over. We will never be able to go back.**_

I want to know that we didn't leave a single issue off the table. I want to know that we hit every single point for the voters. I want to be certain that we did our best job explaining WHY America needs our platform.

[**But I need YOU to step up at the FINAL hour by taking the Final Case for America Survey to determine what still needs to be said to win this election in 5 days.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzA4LWNmYTY3ZjdmOTJmODQ2MGNiOTE5ZmMxMGJjOGFmMjk3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24udHJ1bXAyMDE2LmNvbS9vdXItZmluYWwtY2FzZS1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249RUxDX2VsZWN0aW9ucy0yMDE2X2Nhc2UtZm9yLWFtZXJpY2EmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q0MtTFktMTEwMzE2LWNhc2UtZm9yLWFtZXJpY2EtaW5oLWpmYy1wcyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBfQ0NfTFk&K=qcDRmXCANzGL7aObM6gCmw)

I want you to tell me which campaign themes and issues will lead us to victory.

I want you to tell me which policies need more attention during the final days of the election.

How we perform over these next few days will determine our future and our children's future for decades to come.

I want to be certain we gave it our all. I want to be certain we made the best possible case to America.

This is YOUR chance to speak up as one of our strongest supporters and help craft our plan for the final hour of the most critical election of our lifetime.

[**Please make it your priority to have a hand in the Final Case for America Survey.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzA4LWNmYTY3ZjdmOTJmODQ2MGNiOTE5ZmMxMGJjOGFmMjk3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24udHJ1bXAyMDE2LmNvbS9vdXItZmluYWwtY2FzZS1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249RUxDX2VsZWN0aW9ucy0yMDE2X2Nhc2UtZm9yLWFtZXJpY2EmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q0MtTFktMTEwMzE2LWNhc2UtZm9yLWFtZXJpY2EtaW5oLWpmYy1wcyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBfQ0NfTFk&K=Y3SbQC5Wui-xe5Dx7jTieQ)

name: Steve Bullock
subject: Let this sink in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Greg Gianforte has spent more than _$5.8 million dollars_ to try to buy the governor's office. **Just let that sink in.**

I want you to know that if it wasn't for our grassroots supporters stepping up time and time again, this race could look a lot different.

But instead we're looking at a contest the pundits are calling a "toss-up," with public polling showing us two points up. There are just five days to go. **Will you help us finish what we 've started and close strong? [Pitch in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=4oYDeYPIpEu5ol0GmMZ%2B7d4QfmnskYj9)**

Thanks,

Steve Bullock

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Everyone called it a long shot
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
I need your help this weekend. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4660/1c469400/1012c62/3544291/2122283510/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema") Friend, When I first ran for the Wisconsin State Senate, pundits called it a long shot. I was up against a sitting senator in a solidly Republican district. Everyone thought we had a snowball's chance in hell. But my family, friends, supporters, and I poured everything we had into our campaign. My grassroots team donated what they could, and volunteered every chance they got. I knocked on thousands and thousands (and thousands!) of doors. Then, the race started getting close. Our hard work was paying off. And, in the end, after a recount, we won by _just 31 votes._ **You know what won that race? The conversations my team and I had with voters.** **We need your help in this race, today. There's not much time until Election Day, and we need to make sure our get-out-the-vote program is fully funded.[Can you make a donation of $5 right now so our field team can knock on more doors, make more phone calls, and speak with more voters here in Wisconsin?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4660/1c469400/1012c62/3544291/2122283510/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4660/1c469400/1012c62/354428e/2122283510/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Thanks for all of your hard work.
Sincerely,
Russ Feingold

name: Katie McGinty
subject: before Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7709124773405523968/-2995430313875734528?refcode=e20161103.3&refcode2=e20161103.3nd&amount=25)
---
Unbelievable --

With just FIVE short days left, this race is still a _dead heat_. We fought our hearts out to get here, and now everything comes down to what we do before Tuesday.

It won't be easy. Pat Toomey's allies are throwing everything they're got at us. Mitch McConnell's Super PAC just poured another $5.2 million into this race to attack us in the homestrech -- _and we 're scrambling to keep up._

But, look, here's what they don't realize: Our grassroots team has NEVER backed down from a challenge, and we're not going to now. Every dollar is going to fund our final sprint GOTV efforts.

[**Please, we can win on Tuesday, but we can 't give up now. Can you pitch in to help us fight? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7709124773405523968/-2995430313875734528?refcode=e20161103.3&refcode2=e20161103.3nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

Katie

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 5 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/7709124773405523968/-2995430313875734528?refcode=e20161103.3&refcode2=e20161103.3nd&amount=25)**

name: Karl Rove
subject: Everyone is watching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

Election Day is only 5 days away. The race for control of the U.S. Senate is down to the wire. Polls are tightening. Everyone is focused on the same handful of Senate battleground races.

**Wisconsin. North Carolina. New Hampshire. Nevada. Florida. Indiana. Ohio. Pennsylvania. Missouri.**

Our Republican Senate majority depends on these states. All these races are neck-and-neck.
**The future of America rests in your hands. Will you step up to make a difference for our Republican campaigns right now?**

**[Pitch in $25 immediately>>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38544158:Wsde3wuN7:m:1:1155937413:7E182FAF5326C5C6A43E3766D48AEA74:r)

[Pitch in $50 immediately >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38544159:Wsde3wuN7:m:1:1155937413:7E182FAF5326C5C6A43E3766D48AEA74:r)

[Pitch in $125 immediately >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38544160:Wsde3wuN7:m:1:1155937413:7E182FAF5326C5C6A43E3766D48AEA74:r)

[Pitch in $150 immediately >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38544161:Wsde3wuN7:m:1:1155937413:7E182FAF5326C5C6A43E3766D48AEA74:r)

[Pitch in $200 immediately >>>](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38544162:Wsde3wuN7:m:1:1155937413:7E182FAF5326C5C6A43E3766D48AEA74:r)**

_All gifts made between now and midnight will be triple-matched to maximize your impact_
**Your support could mean the difference between victory and defeat for Senate Republicans on Election Night.**

To gain control of the Senate, Democrats and their liberal Super PAC allies are spending millions on last-minute attack ads and get-out-the-vote operations.

**We need your help** to fight back in a final response ad blitz, before it's too late.

[**I strongly urge you to chip in $25, $50, $100 or any amount you can to help conservatives overcome the attack ads and liberal media lies and get our message out.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38544163:Wsde3wuN7:m:1:1155937413:7E182FAF5326C5C6A43E3766D48AEA74:r)

This is your most important opportunity all year to make a difference in our 2016 Senate races. Many Republican candidates are deadlocked in the polls with their Democratic opponents. Your support could bring about victory in this final week.

I hope we can count on you to help deliver the Republican majority America needs.

Thank you,

Karl Rove
| [3X MATCH MY DONATION](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38544164:Wsde3wuN7:m:1:1155937413:7E182FAF5326C5C6A43E3766D48AEA74:r)

name: Jim Justice
subject: Why I Support Bill Cole
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --

I am honored to support Bill Cole for Governor. Bill Cole is a man of **integrity**. He's an honest man who truly cares about West Virginia and puts the needs of the state he loves so dearly before himself.

West Virginia has been held back for so long by people that put their own interests and pocketbooks before the needs of West Virginians. West Virginia ends up #50 on every list because the good ol' boys put themselves first.

Bill Cole is a businessman, not a politician. He's a businessman whose businesses serve everyday people. He's a respectable man, father, husband, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

83 years of Democrat Party rule cannot be undone in two years which is why we need Bill Cole as Governor to continue to make the necessary changes to make West Virginia great again.

As you can see, I share the same name with the Democratic nominee for Governor, but that is as far as it goes. Just as with Hillary Clinton, the Democratic nominee for President, there are just too many questions that have been left unanswered by these two individuals -- politically, financially, legally, and ethically.

I know Bill Cole and have trust and confidence in him to make West Virginia and the surrounding areas a better place to live and work.

I donated to Bill Cole today and I encourage you to do the same. [Click here to donate.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jimjustice&n=1)

Jim Justice
(the one from Bluefield)

body:
Earn your spot on our wall. This is a HUGE opportunity. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba-FwBAD4L6CAeWgaB1-qDRMN6aaaaDZVaBMBW2U5a?o=8@08wC2&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=k&r=&x=v7u9vA4zl0gv4jitix42UrfEXpnEctbEdlWEnEnEbl4k47&nEn)

Friend,

I want to share something special with you.

I am dedicating a wall at campaign HQ in Trump Tower for a select group of donors who chose to step up during the final stretch of the most important election of our lifetime.

But space is LIMITED. We can only fit 2,000 more names on the wall, so you'll need to act fast.

[**Please make a contribution of at least $49 to earn your spot on the TRUMP Donor Wall.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba-FwBAD4L6CAeWgaB1-qDRMN6aaaaDZVaBMBW2U5a?o=8@08wC2&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=l&r=&x=v7u9vA4zl0gv4jitix42UrfEXpnEctbEdlWEnEnEbl4k47&nEn)

The names on our TRUMP Donor Wall are the men and women who've chipped in whatever they can to save our country.

Most campaigns only ever recognize the biggest donors. But this campaign is about more than money. Ours is a movement fueled by patriots -- hardworking, tough Americans who know what it takes to win this election and win for our country.

These patriots humble me. They remind me why I get up every single day to fight for America.

I'm inviting you to join them during the final hour of the most important election of our lifetime.

[**Please make a contribution of $49 to add your name to the TRUMP Donor Wall.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgba-FwBAD4L6CAeWgaB1-qDRMN6aaaaDZVaBMBW2U5a?o=8@08wC2&k=Xvqofrcy0B_asUof.iis&f=j&r=&x=v7u9vA4zl0gv4jitix42UrfEXpnEctbEdlWEnEnEbl4k47&nEn)

Donald J. Trump

name: Rob Portman
subject: Our final ad
body:
| Peter,

I want you to be among the first to see the final ad of our campaign, "[Flag Factory](https://www.robportman.com/watch_flag_factory?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=flag_outreach&n=1)."

America's oldest flag company, Annin Flagmakers, is right here in Ohio. Annin made the flag that was hoisted at Iwo Jima and the one that was planted on the moon. Today, they make eight million flags a year.

Annin employees and workers all across Ohio deserve a fair shot to compete. I'll continue to stand up for them and to fight back against countries like China when they threaten Ohio jobs.

[](https://www.robportman.com/watch_flag_factory?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=flag_outreach&n=2)
This coming Tuesday, Ohio voters will have a clear choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

You can [click here](https://www.robportman.com/watch_flag_factory?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=flag_outreach&n=3) to watch "Flag Factory." I'd appreciate your vote so I can continue to fight for Ohio jobs. All best,
Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=flag_outreach&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=flag_outreach&n=5)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=flag_outreach&n=6)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=flag_outreach&n=7). -=-=-

subject: Friend, please hear me on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:

When I reflect on the progress we've made these past eight years -- bringing healthcare to 20 million people, helping businesses create millions of new jobs, making college affordable for so many young people, and so much more -- I remember who made it all possible.

name: Michelle Obama
subject: Deborah's got this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| To my fellow Deborah backers,

Back when Deborah first joined this race, it was a long shot. But she's run a strong campaign and shown people in North Carolina just how much she cares about you and your families - and today, this race is tied.

We know that Deborah can do this, but only if we're willing to help her get over the finish line. [_**Please, consider giving $5 or $10 to her grassroots network if you can.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f4207f/2cc31c44/4c6bbc6/19f9c0b1/690130882/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161103?refcode=dre161103_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

My husband reached out to you last month to tell you why he's supporting Deborah, and now I want to tell you why I am.

Deborah cares deeply about the people of her state. As the daughter of a doctor who served in the Air Force during the Vietnam era, Deborah is passionate about supporting our veterans and their families once they return home. And I know she'll work to improve our VA system and ensure veterans receive the wellness, education, and employment opportunities they've earned.

Deborah is also determined to help families achieve greater economic security by cutting taxes, helping women get equal pay for equal work, and making childcare and college tuition more affordable.

Deborah believes that folks who are willing to work hard should have a chance to build a decent life for themselves and an even better life for their kids. I know this is what North Carolinians believe too - that's why Deborah has gotten this far.

[_**I hope you will help Deborah protect and build on everything we 've accomplished together over the past eight years by contributing $5 or $10 to help her win this election and serve the people of North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f4207f/2cc31c44/4c6bbc6/19f9c0b1/690130882/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161103?refcode=dre161103_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thanks so much,

Michelle |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
P.O. Box 28258
Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f4207f/2cc31c44/4c6bbc6/19f9c0b0/690130882/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.deborahross.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Indiana Senate HQ
subject: FWD: Can you give Evan an hour?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f7/7be36b49/1e27d284/78f9b9b3/1615892032/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

Did you see Peter's email yesterday? In case you missed it: **We need volunteers to step up and[commit an hour or more of their time to get out the vote.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f7/7be36b49/1e27d284/78f9b9b2/1615892032/VEsE/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/volunteer-november-3")** If we don't get enough volunteers, _we could lose this election._

At the end of the day, **getting out the vote is what counts.** Voters -- not attack ads or big checks -- will determine who will represent Hoosiers in the Senate.

Friend, there are only five days left in this race. It's the end of the line. **We _need_ you. **[**Click here to sign up for a volunteer shift.**](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f7/7be36b49/1e27d284/78f9b9b2/1615892032/VEsF/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/volunteer-november-3")

Thanks,

Team Bayh _\-- Original message --
Sender: Peter Hanscom
Subject: Can you give Evan an hour?_ Friend,

I know we've asked you for a lot, but this request may be the most important of our campaign: **[Can you commit to an hour or more of volunteering for our Get Out the Vote effort between now and Election Day?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f7/7be36b49/1e27d284/78f9b9b2/1615892032/VEsC/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/volunteer-november-3")**

I'm not exaggerating when I say your help is essential to an Evan Bayh win. I've worked on many races in Indiana, and every time the thing that made the difference was the strength of the Get Out The Vote effort. The power players will spend their money on fancy ads and endorsements -- but the ground game is what really wins elections.

**And in a race as close as ours, we need every single supporter who is able to help us get out the vote.** Whether you want to knock on doors, make phone calls, register voters, or something else, we'll welcome your help.

**[Please sign up today and someone from our campaign will contact you.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f7/7be36b49/1e27d284/78f9b9b2/1615892032/VEsD/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/volunteer-november-3")** **********[Volunteer!>>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f7/7be36b49/1e27d284/78f9b9b2/1615892032/VEsA/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/volunteer-november-3")********** This last week before the election is our LAST CHANCE to reach all the voters we need to. Please, make sure we don't fall short.

Thank you,

Peter Hanscom
Indiana Democratic Party Coordinated Campaign Director

P.S. We hope you can come volunteer with us. But if you can't, **[donating to the campaign is another great way to help.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f7/7be36b49/1e27d284/78f9b9b1/1615892032/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161103&amount=25")** ** ** ** ** ** ** **********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f7/7be36b49/1e27d284/78f9b9b1/1615892032/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161103&amount=25")********** ** **
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f7/7be36b49/1e27d284/78f9b9b0/1615892032/VEsP/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.
---

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: They can't buy this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Over the course of this election we've seen right-wing billionaires like Sheldon Adelson and the Koch brothers funnel millions of dollars into races up and down the ballot.
Wealthy donors like Adelson and the Kochs are trying their best to buy these races for two reasons. First - they want lawmakers who feel beholden to their money to be at their beck and call. But more importantly, they're afraid.
They're afraid that if we win, it will show once and for all that **their money is no match for our movement.**
Four of our candidates are being attacked by big money in the final days of this campaign, and we need to help them now.
This is very important: today is realistically the last day your contributions can be put to use by congressional campaigns. **If you have been thinking about donating to support candidates from our political revolution, you must do so today.**
[**Help us show the billionaire class that this election is not for sale to the highest bidder. Please add a $4 contribution now to split for Morgan Carroll, Pramila Jayapal, Tom Nelson and Rick Nolan.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-these-4-candidates?refcode=em161103-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-these-4-candidates?refcode=em161103-a")
There are a few races in particular where billionaires have tried to stop our movement.
**Rick Nolan, Pramila Jayapal, Morgan Carroll and Tom Nelson** have been outspoken progressives who are unafraid to take on powerful special interests. Those special interests responded to several of these candidates by funneling millions to support their opponents.
These races are ones we can win. **And when we do, we 'll have the chance to enact the most progressive agenda of any party in American history.** But we need your help.
[**This is your last chance to make a difference for races for Congress. Please contribute $4 for Morgan Carroll, Pramila Jayapal, Tom Nelson and Rick Nolan to help defeat special interests.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-these-4-candidates?refcode=em161103-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-these-4-candidates?refcode=em161103-a")
Thanks for all you do.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-these-4-candidates?refcode=em161103-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-these-4-candidates?refcode=em161103-a")**

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Inaugural-Year Membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Renew your 2017 party membership before Election Day. |

Friend, When I become your next president, I want to know that we have a strong Party supporting our Platform for America. With our Majority intact, we will confirm Supreme Court justices in the mold of the late Justice Scalia, we will REPEAL and REPLACE ObamaCare, we will end Obama’s illegal executive orders, and we will build the wall that Mexico will pay for. In order to strengthen our Party before I’m sworn into office, I’m asking you to renew your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 inaugural year. Please renew your Inaugural-Year 2017 Sustaining Membership for a one-time induction fee of $35. We’ve brought so many new voters into our Party -- and you should be proud of this tremendous achievement. In 2017, we will take our new mandate from the American people and enact a bold agenda that will truly Make America Great Again! January 20, 2017 will be a historic day for our movement, our Party, and most of all, our country. You’ll be able to hold a piece of that history as a 2017 Sustaining Member. And by renewing your membership before the election, you will have living proof of the fact that you believed we could win this election despite the media’s barrage of attacks and lies. Please renew your Inaugural-Year 2017 Sustaining Membership for a one-time induction fee of $35. Thank you, Donald J. Trump RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP

clean_body: Renew your 2017 party membership before Election Day. | Friend, When I become your next president, I want to know that we have a strong Party supporting our Platform for America. With our Majority intact, we will confirm Supreme Court justices in the mold of the late Justice Scalia, we will REPEAL and REPLACE ObamaCare, we will end Obama’s illegal executive orders, and we will build the wall that Mexico will pay for. In order to strengthen our Party before I’m sworn into office, I’m asking you to renew your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 inaugural year. Please renew your Inaugural-Year 2017 Sustaining Membership for a one-time induction fee of $35. We’ve brought so many new voters into our Party -- and you should be proud of this tremendous achievement. In 2017, we will take our new mandate from the American people and enact a bold agenda that will truly Make America Great Again! January 20, 2017 will be a historic day for our movement, our Party, and most of all, our country. You’ll be able to hold a piece of that history as a 2017 Sustaining Member. And by renewing your membership before the election, you will have living proof of the fact that you believed we could win this election despite the media’s barrage of attacks and lies. Please renew your Inaugural-Year 2017 Sustaining Membership for a one-time induction fee of $35. Thank you, Donald J. Trump RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: Pat Murray (via VanHollen.org)
subject: update: early voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Here are our top three reasons to cast an early vote today: |
Friend, since Maryland's early voting centers close today at 8pm, I wanted to send you a quick note to encourage you to consider early voting.

**Here are our top three reasons to cast an early vote today:**

1\. You're one step closer to electing Chris as the next Senator of Maryland.

2\. We all know that life gets busy. If you vote early, you'll have one less thing on your to-do list for Tuesday, November 8 in case other pressing things come up at the last minute.

3\. And finally, if you vote early **TODAY** before the polls close you can volunteer for the Van Hollen Team on Election Day!

There are just hours left before the polls close for early voting. **[Please click here to confirm where you'll vote, and then make a plan to head to the polls.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b71/70cdc2ba/47307432/3978505/2478649988/VEsH/ "http://www.elections.state.md.us/voting/early_voting.html?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+click+here+to+confirm+where+yours&utm_campaign=em110316_1&source=em110316_1")**

Let's get out and make change happen, friend!

Pat Murray
Campaign Manager
Van Hollen for Senate [DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b71/70cdc2ba/47307432/3978502/2478649988/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em110316_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em110316_1&source=em110316_1")

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b71/70cdc2ba/47307432/3978503/2478649988/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em110316_1&source=em110316_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Senator Elizabeth Warren
subject: Will you help them like you helped me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74b0/24c69fd9/74235cf/18ed6729/3064144322/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

When I was thinking about running for Senate, EMILY's List President Stephanie Schriock was one of the first people who reached out.

Stephanie came to my home, sat on the couch, rubbed the dog's ears, and said two things: One, here's what running for the Senate would look like, from talking to voters to raising money to what it's like to be in the public eye. Two, if I'd take on this fight, she promised the EMILY's List community would be there every step of the way.

And it was true -- you were there every step of the way.

So many women running for office this year are also grateful that you've been there for them every step of the way -- and they're counting on that same commitment in these final days of the election.

We've got a presidency to win, a Senate to flip, a House to clean up, and over 100 women running for state and local office that EMILY's List has endorsed. And we've only got five days left to make sure they win.

**[These candidates are all counting on your support just like I did. Donate to EMILY's List-- whatever you can afford -- to have their backs in these final days.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74b0/24c69fd9/74235cf/18ed672a/3064144322/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161103_email_Warren?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+These+candidates+are+all+counting+on+you&utm_campaign=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all")**

I've been on the campaign trail in states like Nevada, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and North Carolina, rallying volunteers, raising money, and doing everything I can to help progressive Democrats in tough races this year. And -- this probably won't surprise you -- a LOT of them are EMILY's List candidates.

That's because EMILY's List isn't afraid of the tough fights. Several of the most competitive Senate races that are key to flipping the Senate? EMILY's List candidates. Twenty-one House seats that could turn from red to blue? EMILY's List candidates.

And our terrific candidate for president, Hillary Clinton? EMILY's List is going to help her shatter the highest glass ceiling of all.

That's how women candidates fight back against all the money and negative attacks and skepticism that women just aren't tough enough for these fights. With EMILY's List.

You never left my side in 2012, and I know you'll do the same for the women of 2016.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women win next Tuesday:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Have-Candidates-Backs](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74b0/24c69fd9/74235cf/18ed672b/3064144322/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161103_email_Warren?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHaveCandidatesBa&utm_campaign=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all")**

Thank you,

Senator Elizabeth Warren

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74b0/24c69fd9/74235cf/18ed6724/3064144322/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161103_email_Warren?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all")

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74b0/24c69fd9/74235cf/18ed6725/3064144322/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74b0/24c69fd9/74235cf/18ed6726/3064144322/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74b0/24c69fd9/74235cf/18ed6727/3064144322/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFEW08N_digital_email_20161103_Warren_n-all"). body:

[ **Time 's running out to flip the Senate! Pitch in >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-OfficialUpdate-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend, we've got 5 days to change the numbers in 5 must-win states:
➢ We're **2 points BEHIND** in Nevada...

➢ **TIED** in Pennsylvania...
➢ And **TIED** in New Hampshire! The only way to surge past McConnell's extremists -- and overcome their onslaught of right-wing dark money -- is by **BOOSTING our ground game.** But we're nearly out of time!

| This is urgent, guys -- the polls are tied, but we got some scary news.

First, we found out the Koch brothers' special interest groups have knocked more than ONE MILLION DOORS in Florida. They're going door to door spreading lies and their right-wing agenda. **They have the cash to get out the vote for Marco Rubio, but right now, we just don 't have the same for Patrick.** You can help fix that: [**chip in right now to our GOTV Rapid Response fund to help us turn out the vote for Patrick.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e18/738133e4/33ec40b9/7f8584cf/355269044/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161103pm?refcode=pme161103pm_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

Next, we found out we lost the lead in early voting numbers here in Florida. Early returns looked amazing for Democrats -- **but Republicans have pulled into the lead.** [**We can retake it, but we need more resources to turn out the vote, defeat Rubio, and retake the Senate >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e18/738133e4/33ec40b9/7f8584cf/355269044/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161103pm?refcode=pme161103pm_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

Your #VOTEPROCHOICE Voter Guide Is Here! | | | [](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vP2n9/6/Y/r5cs/6LsaSx/saDL0Ler1Y) |
---|---
| | Dear Activist,

The vast majority of humans are disgusted and horrified by Donald Trump. So let's turn our horror into action and vote in record numbers to defeat Trump and elect Hillary Clinton as our first woman President!
But let's not stop there. We can defeat all the "little Trumps" if we [#VOTEPROCHOICE](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vP2n9/s/sr/r5cs/6LsaSx/vZAaFf0Epo "Link: http://bit.ly/vpcvgfront")
all the way down the ballot.
To make this as easy as possible, here is **the**[**#VOTEPROCHOICE Voter Guide**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vP2n9/v/sr/r5cs/6LsaSx/s877OwrbOT "Link: http://bit.ly/vpcvgfront") so everyone headed to the polls knows where their candidates stand on reproductive rights.

Please help us get the **[#VOTEPROCHOICE Voter Guide](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vP2n9/z/sr/r5cs/6LsaSx/vEo7zme0ot "Link: http://bit.ly/vpcvgfront")** into the hands of every prochoice voter in America. |

We have over 10,000 prochoice endorsements from our partners and prochoice friends. _[Help us get this out to all your prochoice friends.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/vP2n9/5/se/r5cs/6LsaSx/sbgYvQEO0c "Link: https://www.facebook.com/VoteProChoice/photos/a.1034924459925369.1073741829.1005566252861190/1168906859860461/?type=3&theater")_ | | | |

Heidi Sieck and Bob Fertik

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Bringing it home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
__We must close strong. | Dear Friend, Five days to go! There's nothing like the energy and excitement we're seeing in cities and towns all across our state during the final days of the campaign -- but we still need your help reaching every possible voter. That's why I'm coming directly to you to ask for $10: | [**GIVE $10 »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTgxMjE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDI2MDQ2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
I'm spending the week firing up volunteers and talking with voters about the decision we face in Washington this election. We've worked to build an economy that works for every Washington family, made big investments in education, and taken steps to combat climate change. We have a lot to be proud of, and more work to do to build off our accomplishments in the next four years. That's the message we want voters to hear in these last five days.
Republican Bill Bryant thinks that by barraging Washington voters with false, negative attacks in this final week, he can squeak out a victory on Tuesday.
**That 's why I'm not taking anything for granted -- I'm going to give these last five days everything I've got, and I hope you will too.**
That's why I'm asking, with five days to go: [**Will you contribute immediately to support our statewide Get Out the Vote efforts?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTgxMjE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDI2MDQ2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Your contribution will support our GOTV operation as our field team and hundreds of dedicated volunteers work to make sure Democrats are voting for governor and other races up and down the ballot. I want to make sure we can continue to build on our progress.
Help us bring home victory on Election Day. Thank you for working so hard.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

name: Team Ross
subject: Rachel Maddow said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Rachel Maddow said it the other night in reference to Senator Burr's latest blunder: **The strain is showing.**

Senator Burr is trying to keep some of the press out of his events. He's not going as far as Trump's media blacklist tactics -- **but he is withholding campaign event details from the _Raleigh News & Observer_.**

Rachel Maddow said what we are all thinking, "[Senator Burr], are you sure it's a good use of your time to try to keep your whole campaign secret from the state's largest paper?"

It's obvious Senator Burr is NOT handling the pressure of a competitive race very well. He knows how tight the polls are, and he's becoming more paranoid by the day.

This is not "leadership." North Carolina families deserve better. It's time for Burr to go.

[_**Help Deborah win on Election Day by pitching in $5 or $10. We need to reach $20,000 by midnight >>**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42073/2cc31c44/4c94aef/19f9c776/246664304/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161103pm?refcode=dre161103pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

name: Trump Team Virginia
subject: Five Days of Opportunities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Peter --

We are at a crossroads. America has the opportunity to elect real change and get the country back on track. It takes a lot of work and we **thank you** for all the effort you have put into helping to MAKE AMERICA GEAT AGAIN!
But the work IS NOT FINISHED! This is a critical time.
As the polls are _tightening,_ it's becoming clear that Mr. Trump's message is resonating with all Americans. **Here in Virginia, the latest poll has Mr. Trump leading by 3 points.** We need to make sure we keep that lead and WIN VIRGINIA on Tuesday.
This cannot be done without YOUR HELP! **Trump Team Virginia has an Election Day goal that we hope you will make sure we reach**. Make a plan to either knock on 40 doors or make 40 phone calls every day from now through Tuesday. _Your help will make a tremendous difference on Election Day for Mr. Trump._
[Click **here** to accept our challenge and join Team Trump!](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Fdocs.google.com-252Fforms-252Fd-252F1VnlUM05EwW8eVjhtBYoGsYxVypsRUhZIhw5ew8NKabQ-252Fedit-26e-3D59344abb3cc5a27d6398ff61009431f7-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Ddjtva5days-26n-3D1-26test-5Femail-3D1%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3D1zwjjReuFl5rd3_t8W5wzVB4GNtGMuzGVq5nfB4ZnAA%26s%3DVXLJc2fbPqxUd5DqGpfKUq5UEK7adUSUGObwMLMDtks%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=djt5days5&n=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Need Your Help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Hillary Clinton and Chris Koster are throwing everything they have at us. They're blanketing the airwaves with lies, but I've got good news.

Yesterday, a new public poll came out showing that we are winning this race! But it's closer than ever. Our lead is just one point. This race is going to come down to one thing: who can get their people to the polls.

Hillary Clinton sent Chris Koster $500,000 to fund his Get Out The Vote efforts. Every liberal activist will be flown in from around the country to help Clinton's chosen candidate win in Missouri.

We can't let Hillary Clinton and Chris Koster win. I've promised, from day one of this campaign, that I've got your back. In these next five days, I need you to have my back.

There are a few things that you can do today to fight back against the Clinton/Koster machine.

1. Commit to fill a shift (https://ericgreitens.com/gotv/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d33d177014-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d33d177014-99411629) in our Get Out The Vote effort in our offices or sign up to call from home. (https://ericgreitens.com/gotv/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d33d177014-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d33d177014-99411629) If you have any free time between today and election day, I need you to join our volunteers who are working around the clock to remind our supporters to vote.

2. If you're watching this race from anywhere around the country, come deploy to Missouri for the final days of this mission to help us have my back. If you're interested, email catherine@ericgreitens.com (mailto:catherine@ericgreitens.com) .

Chris Koster has the entire Clinton Machine supporting his campaign. She's sending every available resource to help him get into office and support her agenda. I need your help this week to take Missouri in a new direction with more jobs, higher pay, safer streets, and better schools.

I've got your back. Will you have mine? (https://ericgreitens.com/gotv/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d33d177014-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d33d177014-99411629)

On to Victory,
Eric Greitens

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d33d177014-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d33d177014-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d33d177014-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d33d177014-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=d33d177014) , but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at team@ericgreitens.com (mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should volunteer (http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d33d177014-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d33d177014-99411629) with us!

body:
The election is only 5 days away. |

Friend, I have committed to a grueling schedule over the final 5 days of the election to explain to as many Americans as possible why the Trump-Pence ticket can truly Make America Great Again! I will work harder than I ever have in my entire life. I will focus on the winning issues. I will fight until the very last vote is cast. This is our FINAL opportunity to make our case to America -- and as always -- I’m going to need your help, Friend. Please take the Final Case for America Survey now to determine what I still need to say to voters across the country to win this election. In just a few days, the election will be over. We will never be able to go back. I want to know that we didn’t leave a single issue off the table. I want to know that we hit every single point for the voters. I want to be certain that we did our best job explaining WHY America needs our platform. Friend: speak up while there is still time to make our case to the American voter. Please take the Final Case for America Survey immediately. Thank you, Donald J. Trump TAKE SURVEY NOW

name: Marc Goldberg
subject: FWD: we screwed up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc4f/2a380d31/14daf5be/ff6275/4238557973/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc4f/2a380d31/14daf5be/ff6275/4238557973/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Did you miss this, everyone?
Our race will determine Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and three recent polls show that if the election were held today, we would LOSE.
The bad news is that we screwed up and missed our online fundraising goal. Now, we urgently need to make up lost ground.

Peter, Four years ago, we thought we could pull it off. We were surging forward in the polls, getting good press, and getting out the vote. And on Election Day, the numbers were closer than ever. But in the end, just 81,644 Hoosiers out of 2.5 million swung the race to Mike Pence. **Peter -- there 's too much at stake to let it happen again. Will you chip in now to make sure this year doesn't turn out like 2012? ** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5218006638417016832/4304457781240793088?utm_campaign=fnd_gotvfr_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161103_fnd_gq_gotvfr_ful__jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)

I'm reaching out to voters every single day, and so are volunteers across the state -- maybe even you.
But the same 81,644 voters who decided the election last time are getting bombarded with even more attack ads funded by my opponent's DC friends -- and so are thousands more.
Each of those votes could make the difference, and we need to reach each one.
But we need the resources to make it possible. And we need your help.
**[Chip in $5 now -- one dollar for each of the final five days of this election -- to help me get out the vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5218006638417016832/4304457781240793088?utm_campaign=fnd_gotvfr_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161103_fnd_gq_gotvfr_ful__jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)**

John

name: Eric Hyers
subject: help prove Steve right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

When I began talking to Steve about joining his team, one of the first things he made clear was that he wasn't going to run any grainy, negative attack ads. Ever. Full stop.

Steve doesn't believe in trying to win that way. He thinks we owe better to Montanans. **Help prove him right and make sure we can get our positive, issue-based, closing ad in front of as many voters as possible.[Donate $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CQwHRlttlRsmHI9VG87l%2FVpVw6yixZR8)**

**Contrast this with what we've seen from Greg Gianforte.** He's spent almost $6 million of his own money on ads so over the line, _even his local newspaper recently had to call him out._ He's throwing everything he can think of at Steve -- with ads jammed-packed full of false assertions. Nasty attack after nasty attack.

Mr. Gianforte has decided that he's willing to take his campaign into the gutter to win. **This race is so close and there are just a few days to make sure Steve 's approach prevails. [Contribute $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=mL52JSA4dfBHW6Ps6WfoT1pVw6yixZR8)**

Thanks,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2eCeYc0RbCdu7m2kuY0UwlpVw6yixZR8)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=my0IokiDzADQ8QkiNUgDK1pVw6yixZR8).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: FW: Our path to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
UPDATED map detailing our path to victory. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba-GxBAD4Z6CA5WgaD33pDRMN6aaaaD33pBMBXSUoa?p=7@w74C4C&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=Y&2=&m=6w5y61DijrDYooDhjht5nim5oah5y5y5maDZDw&y5y)

Friend,

You're going to like this. My team has written an UPDATED memo detailing the current state of the race below.

It shows you the progress we've made over the last two weeks as well as what we STILL need to do to deliver a big win in**just 5 days.**

_Just like before, I 've highlighted the key parts that you **NEED** to know at this point in the race._

TO: [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba-GxBAD4Z6CA5WgaD33pDRMN6aaaaD33pBMBXSUoa?p=7@w74C4C&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=X&2=&m=6w5y61DijrDYooDhjht5nim5oah5y5y5maDZDw&y5y)
FROM: Brad Parscale, Digital Director
RE: *UPDATED* Path to 270 Electoral Votes

________________________________________

I've updated the map below to reflect our internal polling. Red states are still considered safe Trump states. Blue states fit safely in Hillary's column. Gray states are toss-ups, but the _**new addition of pink states show where our hard work has been paying off the most.**_
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba-GxBAD4Z6CA5WgaD33pDRMN6aaaaD33pBMBXSUoa?p=7@w74C4C&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=a&2=&m=6w5y61DijrDYooDhjht5nim5oah5y5y5maDZDw&y5y)
As you can see above, we have strengthened our leads in six battleground states: **Florida** , **Ohio** , **Iowa** , **Maine** , **North Carolina** , and **Nevada**. If this trend continues until Election Day, _we can bank on 266 electoral votes._

From there, we only need _**ONE**_ of the following states to win (in order of where we're doing best): Colorado, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, Virginia, New Mexico, or Minnesota.

With a clear path to victory, we just announced an aggressive $25 million final ad-buy in the 13 most winnable battleground states. Tightening polls have even forced Hillary to make her first-ever ad-buy in Wisconsin.

With ObamaCare falling apart, our sharpened focus on the issues, and the FBI's reopening of their investigation into Hillary's emails, _Donald Trump has shot up in national polls_ while **Hillary is losing momentum even in traditionally blue states** of Minnesota and New Mexico.

I say this with full confidence: _we can win this election._

_We cannot rest until every single one of those pink states is red_ \-- and we pick up at least ONE more toss-up state. I won't stop fighting now. _And I hope you 'll step up with me at the final hour._

We're so close to winning, but it's not in the bag. With just 5 days left, I need you to step up at this critical moment to help fund our last-minute ad-buy and get-out-the-vote ground game.

**Because you 've been such a critical supporter, you'll once again be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in.**

[**Please step up with a contribution to help us reach 270 electoral votes and WIN this election for America.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba-GxBAD4Z6CA5WgaD33pDRMN6aaaaD33pBMBXSUoa?p=7@w74C4C&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=W&2=&m=6w5y61DijrDYooDhjht5nim5oah5y5y5maDZDw&y5y)

Thank you and God bless you,

Donald J. Trump

**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba-GxBAD4Z6CA5WgaD33pDRMN6aaaaD33pBMBXSUoa?p=7@w74C4C&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=Z&2=&m=6w5y61DijrDYooDhjht5nim5oah5y5y5maDZDw&y5y)**

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
---
[Unsubscribe](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/edfba-GxBAD4Z6CA5WgaD33pDRMN6aaaaD33pBMBXSUoa?p=7@w74C4C&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=e&2=) Or unsubscribe by [email](mailto:unsubscribe@gop.com?Subject=Unsubscribe%20dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---

name: Barney Frank
subject: I'm personally asking, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
It used to be unthinkable that GOP partisanship would go so far as to disable an entire branch of government. [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
It used to be unthinkable that GOP partisanship would go so far as to disable an entire branch of government.

But here we are in the final days of the election and Republican Senate candidates are proudly touting their refusal to even hold Supreme Court hearings. **It begs the question -- how do we fight for our democracy in the face of unrelenting GOP extremism?**

**Simple: Break the GOP 's grip on the Senate! [That's why we need to go all-in with the DSCC to put Democrats back in charge. Can I count on you to chip in, Friend?](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

It's not enough just to have an opinion about Republican obstruction or their devolvement into the Party of Trump. **Just look at the Kochs and right-wing special interests -- they 're not arguing ethics, they're signing seven-figure checks!**

The _only_ thing that matters now is the resources Democrats have on the ground to turn out votes, mobilize our base, and WIN this election coast-to-coast.

**Friend, we can 't take on McConnell's entrenched majority without you. Please, pitch in what you can to ensure Democratic victory on Tuesday:**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Donnellan?=
subject: Ever seen a sitting governor throw a tantrum?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=98caa4f77f&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Friend

Have you ever seen a sitting governor throw a tantrum?

[We did, just last night.](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=ef2a06f315&e=32f1a3df98) Governor Inslee, after arriving late to what was originally supposed to be a debate (he refused any rule structure that would have allowed for interaction between himself and Bill) Inslee refused to take the stage. His wife Trudi had to convince him it was safe to come out.

Jay Inslee, a sitting governor, who is expected (but often fails) to work with those who disagree with him to achieve solutions to complicated issues won’t even sit down for a conversation about who is more suited to lead our state.

I think we have our answer.

This is a governor who doesn’t even show up to meetings on how to fund education. One who tries and fails to block landmark legislation to cut state tuition rates, and then takes credit for its successes once Republicans successfully overcame his obstructionism.

It’s no wonder his administration has been marred by scandals and failures.

Check out our press release below, and [**_click this link to see the full footage_**](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=abbcc855b4&e=32f1a3df98) of his backstage meltdown last night.

In the final days of the campaign, we’re doing everything we can to contact the 12% of Washington voters who haven’t decided who they’re casting a ballot for yet, so please help with our GOTV efforts. [**_$25, $50, $100, $250, or more would help us get our message out._**](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=a45a3d97dd&e=32f1a3df98)
**[ *CONTRIBUTE* ](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=c8f1f29987&e=32f1a3df98)** **Matt Donnellan**
Political Director
Bill Bryant for Governor

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jason Roe
Date: Thurs, Nov 3, 2016 at 12:01 PM
Subject: Fwd: Bryant Shines in Final Forum - Inslee Refuses to Participate
To: Matthew Donnellan

For Immediate Release
Contact: Jason Roe (253)220-5051
Jason@BillBryantForGovernor.com **Bryant Shines in Final Forum **
_Inslee Refuses to Participate _
(Seattle, Wash.) – What was originally scheduled to be a debate until Gov. Inslee refused, then was scheduled to be a forum, until Gov. Inslee refused, and then became individual one-on-one interviews, devolved into one of the more bizarre incidents of the 2016 gubernatorial campaign.

Arriving late to the event at Puget Sound University, Governor Inslee refused to take the stage as long as Republican candidate Bill Bryant was on it. The moderator announced Inslee’s refusal then said “the Governor, who is now here, doesn’t want to occupy the table with Bill. Bill got the table by himself, the Governor would like the table by himself. So, I propose we sit here until he figures out whether he wants to be part of the forum.”

The governor’s wife, Trudi, rose to announce a “misunderstanding.” Mrs. Inslee went backstage and moments later, the governor appeared. The event organizer then announced that the terms were negotiated in advance and agreed to, and that she expected the agreement to stand. Governor Inslee then took the stage and participated in an abbreviated session.

Bryant displayed a clear command of the important issues facing Washington and outlined his priorities: improving schools, addressing homelessness and mental health, reducing traffic, protecting our environment, and making government transparent and accountable to the public.

"Washington deserves a governor who will tackle the challenges facing our state and build on the opportunities we have,” said Bryant. “Jay Inslee’s petulant, childish behavior was unbecoming of a governor.”

With yesterday’s new allegations of abuse and mismanagement at Western State Hospital it is not surprising the governor was hesitant to join Bryant in a debate. Even after finally agreeing to participate, Inslee still refused to answer difficult questions and still refused to state he would veto any new income tax.

Bryant was asked during the event if he would veto an income tax and declared unequivocally that he would and then suggested that the moderator press Inslee on the topic, who will only say he doesn’t support an income tax. As predicted, the governor once again flatly refused to say he would veto an income tax.

Governor Inslee has already come out in favor of a capital gains income tax and as a candidate in 2012, pledged to veto any tax increases but then supported more than $1 billion in new taxes once he was elected. ###
