| Over the past few days, Senator Burr gave us a taste of how he would spend his next six years in Washington.

**It 's pretty much how he spent his first 20 years -- putting himself ahead of working North Carolina families.**

Aside from making an awful "joke" about putting a bullseye on Hillary Clinton, he bragged that, should Hillary become President, he would refuse to do his constitutional duty and fill a vacancy on the Supreme Court for another four years.

**We can 't make Senator Burr care about North Carolinians, but we can elect Deborah and give Democrats control of the Senate.**

[_**We need to act now. This race is still tied up. We have 5 days left. Give $5 or $10 now and help us reach our goal of $20,000 by midnight.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42074/2cc31c44/4cdcab2/19f9c752/1775650865/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161103pm2?refcode=dre161103pm2_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

subject: I don't want to turn anyone down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f1/7be36b49/1e256e8c/78f9867b/2962456361/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- These days, donations barely have a chance to hit my mailbox before I have to send them out to the field again. That's the only way we're keeping our ambitious statewide Get Out The Vote program afloat.

**[Can you help us out by rushing a $5 contribution today?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f1/7be36b49/1e256e8c/78f9867a/2962456361/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161103.2nd.b&amount=10")**

With five days left in this race, every request I get is marked "urgent." "Emily, can you send gas money for canvassers to the Evansville field office? It's urgent."

"Emily, we just identified a new group of undecided voters and need some phones to call them. It's urgent."

"Emily, we're low on voter education materials in Fort Wayne. It's urgent!" I don't want to turn anyone down, especially when I know it could make the difference between winning and losing. But the money just isn't there. **Friend, if we want to win this race and elect Evan as Indiana 's next senator, then _we need to leave everything on the field._**

I know my team and I have asked a million times -- but **this is when it counts.[Will you please rush a $5 donation so we can afford all the tiny (but HUGE) things we still have to do to win?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f1/7be36b49/1e256e8c/78f9867a/2962456361/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161103.2nd.b&amount=10")**

Thank you very much,

Emily Gurwitz

Dear Peter, Many of you have been with us from the start of this journey and some just discovered us recently. Like Donald Trump, I can't be bought. This is why the establishment doesn't care who the next US Senator from Louisiana is AS LONG AS IT IS NOT ROB MANESS. Its clearer than ever that only qualified outsiders like myself have a chance to join the handful of leaders in the US Senate that can restore the rule of law, end cronyism, defeat ISIS, and restore free market prosperity to America. We consider you part of our family and we consider you daily in our prayers as we also pray for America. We thank you for caring enough to get involved to restore and preserve liberty through our campaign. **Saturday at noon we must place our final advertising buy to get out our vote.** Your support and contributions have gotten us this far, and I'm asking you to do the very best you can right now as you read this so we can finish strong. I promise you one thing. If I tell you I am going to do something in the US Senate, I will do it. clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, Many of you have been with us from the start of this journey and some just discovered us recently. Like Donald Trump, I can't be bought. This is why the establishment doesn't care who the next US Senator from Louisiana is AS LONG AS IT IS NOT ROB MANESS. Its clearer than ever that only qualified outsiders like myself have a chance to join the handful of leaders in the US Senate that can restore the rule of law, end cronyism, defeat ISIS, and restore free market prosperity to America. We consider you part of our family and we consider you daily in our prayers as we also pray for America. We thank you for caring enough to get involved to restore and preserve liberty through our campaign. Saturday at noon we must place our final advertising buy to get out our vote. Your support and contributions have gotten us this far, and I'm asking you to do the very best you can right now as you read this so we can finish strong. I promise you one thing. If I tell you I am going to do something in the US Senate, I will do it. | | | God Bless You And America, Rob Maness For Candy and the Maness Family | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLONEL ROB MANESS Friends of Colonel Rob Maness · United States

clean_body: Friend, There are just days until Election Day! The polls are showing extremely tight races all across the state and with your help, we can ensure Republican victories on November 8. We need people to make phone calls to turn out our voters on Election Day. Can you join us at one of our offices below? Every shift is critical to our effort. Concord 10 Water St 03301 Dover 495 Central Ave 03820 Keene 222 West St Unit A-17 03431 Laconia 653 Main St 03246 Manchester 340 Granite St 03102 Nashua 11 Main St 03064 Salem 303 S Broadway 03079 Stratham 62 Portsmouth Ave 03885 Click HERE to get involved. name: Kelley
subject: Fwd: scrambling
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Hey folks, sorry to bug you so late, but I wanted to make sure you saw Katie's note.

We're JUST short of our daily goal right now -- and with only 5 quick days until voters head to the ballot box, every single day is make-or-break.

**Can you put us over the top? Pitch in $5 or whatever you can here:**

[**www.katiemcginty.com/donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4754852177644617728/2050290118639484928?refcode=e20161103.5&refcode2=e20161103.5nd&amount=25)

Nearly there,

Kelley

_\---- Forwarded Message ----_
**From:** Katie McGinty
**Subject:** scrambling
**Date:** November 3, 2016 at 1:17 PM

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4754852177644617728/2050290118639484928?refcode=e20161103.5&refcode2=e20161103.5nd&amount=25)

Unbelievable --

With just FIVE short days left, this race is still a _dead heat_. We fought our hearts out to get here, and now everything comes down to what we do before Tuesday.

It won't be easy. Pat Toomey's allies are throwing everything they've got at us. Mitch McConnell's Super PAC just poured another $5.2 million into this race to attack us in the homestretch -- _and we 're scrambling to keep up._

But, look, here's what they don't realize: Our grassroots team has NEVER backed down from a challenge, and we're not going to now. Every dollar is going to fund our final sprint GOTV efforts.

[**Please, we can win on Tuesday, but we can 't give up now. Can you pitch in to help us fight? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4754852177644617728/2050290118639484928?refcode=e20161103.5&refcode2=e20161103.5nd&amount=25)

**[Quick, chip in->](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4754852177644617728/2050290118639484928?refcode=e20161103.5&refcode2=e20161103.5nd&amount=25)**
Thank you,

Katie

---
| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 5 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4754852177644617728/2050290118639484928?refcode=e20161103.5&refcode2=e20161103.5nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4754852177644617728/1978232524601556992).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Want To Celebrate Together?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Join your fellow Trump supporters in New York for the biggest Election Night party in America. |

Friend, November 8th will be here before we know it. And it’s going to be a historic night with a momentous celebration that I don’t want you to miss. So contribute $3 today and you will be automatically entered for a chance to be there with us, at our Election Night Party in New York. Friend, we’re going to have a lot to celebrate on Election Night. We’re going to celebrate a movement of American patriots who fought the corrupt, rigged system and took their country back. We’re going to celebrate an agenda that serves the American people by lowering taxes, protecting workers, and protecting all Americans overseas and right here at home. And I’m going to be celebrating your support Friend, so I really hope you’ll enter right now and have a chance for me to thank you that night. Contribute $3 right now to be automatically entered to win. Let’s celebrate together, Donald Trump ENTER TO WIN

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. Entries must be received between October 4, 2016 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on November 3, 2016 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: Round trip airfare for the winner and one guest to New York, hotel accommodations for one (1) night for the winner and one guest, ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, and admittance for winner and guest to Trump Campaign Election Night Party in New York, New York. (approximate retail value $2,000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915.
Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: Michael Barnhill, Team Cooper
subject: Two points
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
That's all that separates Roy and Governor McCrory in today's latest poll. We're up, friends, but it's extremely close.
Two points. That's all that separates Roy and Governor McCrory in today's latest poll. We're up, friends, but it's extremely close.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202aab/2fde7c66/436721e3/15693cc5/1905577222/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-fivedays?utm_campaign=fnd_5days_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161102_fnd_gq_5days_ful__mb&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Two points. That's all that separates Roy and Governor McCrory in today's latest poll. We're up, friends, but it's extremely close. **Over these remaining five days, we're making our final push. name: BernieSanders.com
subject: "I wouldn't have been able to get any of this."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
How important are your contributions? This article shows just how critical small-dollar donations are to people running for down ballot offices. Sabrina Shrader is running for West Virginia legislature, and she received $12,000 from thousands of small contributions. [**It completely changed her campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161103-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161103-nd")
> "When Sabrina Shrader was growing up in McDowell County, she was taught not to talk about poverty. She was discouraged from discussing problems in her life. She definitely wasn't pushed to run for political office...
> "The additional funding has been a huge boost to Shrader's limited campaign. It's allowed her to pay for yard signs, some political mailers, several billboards around town and a couple of large campaign magnets for the side of her orange Chevy sedan -- advertising that elicits more than few honks as she drives through town.
> "On the first day of early voting, Shrader was back at the local radio station to record one of her last advertisements before Election Day. It took her one take to deliver the message that she had written out with the help of her family -- her public-speaking practice obviously coming in handy.
> "'I wouldn't have been able to get any of this,' Shrader said, as she stood in the small studio dressed in blue jeans, a blazer and a string of plastic pearls. 'I probably would have just had some fliers.'"
Even if you contribute just a few dollars, you can shake up whole elections. **And tonight is the best chance for your contributions to make a difference in congressional and local elections. That's why we are asking you now:**
[**Please split a $3 contribution between Pramila Jayapal, Nanette Barragan, Morgan Carroll, Tom Nelson, Rick Nolan, Jane Kim, and Peter Jacob.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161103-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161103-nd")
Thank you for all you're doing to continue our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161103-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161103-nd")**

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

| **For Immediate Release: **
November 3, 2016

Contact: Ethan Latour
_ethan@philscott.org_
_802-595-3776_
**High Road to Victory Tour Building Momentum into Day 5 **
Montpelier, Vt. – After another long day of visiting businesses, meeting with Vermonters, and enjoying local fare, the High Road to Victory Tour continues to build energy around Phil Scott’s priorities: growing the economy; making Vermont more affordable; and investing in pro-growth initiatives like early education, affordable housing, and workforce development.

“It’s a packed schedule,” said campaign spokeswoman Brittney Wilson. “But we are the only campaign in this election willing to go to these lengths to talk to so many Vermonters directly and we are seeing the momentum build everyday,” Wilson added.

The High Road to Victory Tour hits its peak on Monday, November 7th with a statewide sprint that will hit all 14 counties and conclude with a high-energy rally at 14th Star Brewing Company in St. Albans.

**The media is invited to join Phil and the team on the road. **

The schedule for Wednesday, November 4th follows:

_FRIDAY, NOVEMBER 4, 2016: LAMOILLE AND CHITTENDEN COUNTIES_

8:30 a.m. Tour VT Teddy Bear Factory (Official)
(Closed Press)

11:00 a.m. So. Burlington Veterans Ctr. Open House (Official)
(Closed Press)

12:45 p.m. Lunch at McGillicuddy’s (Open Press)
28 Walnut St., Williston

1:45 p.m. Sign Wave (Open Press)
Rt. 2A and Cypress St, Williston (in front of Chili’s)

3:30 p.m. Vermont Farm Bureau (Open Press)
Stoweflake Conference Center
1746 Mountain Rd, Stowe

4:30 p.m. Sign Wave (Open Press)
Intersection of Rt. 108 and 100, Stowe

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | For Immediate Release: November 3, 2016 Contact: Ethan Latour ethan@philscott.org 802-595-3776 High Road to Victory Tour Building Momentum into Day 5 Montpelier, Vt. – After another long day of visiting businesses, meeting with Vermonters, and enjoying local fare, the High Road to Victory Tour continues to build energy around Phil Scott’s priorities: growing the economy; making Vermont more affordable; and investing in pro-growth initiatives like early education, affordable housing, and workforce development. “It’s a packed schedule,” said campaign spokeswoman Brittney Wilson. “But we are the only campaign in this election willing to go to these lengths to talk to so many Vermonters directly and we are seeing the momentum build everyday,” Wilson added. The High Road to Victory Tour hits its peak on Monday, November 7th with a statewide sprint that will hit all 14 counties and conclude with a high-energy rally at 14th Star Brewing Company in St. Albans. The media is invited to join Phil and the team on the road. The schedule for Wednesday, November 4th follows: FRIDAY, NOVEMBER 4, 2016: LAMOILLE AND CHITTENDEN COUNTIES 8:30 a.m. Tour VT Teddy Bear Factory (Official) (Closed Press) 11:00 a.m. So. Burlington Veterans Ctr. Open House (Official) (Closed Press) 12:45 p.m. Lunch at McGillicuddy’s (Open Press) 28 Walnut St., Williston 1:45 p.m. Sign Wave (Open Press) Rt. 2A and Cypress St, Williston (in front of Chili’s) 3:30 p.m. Vermont Farm Bureau (Open Press) Stoweflake Conference Center 1746 Mountain Rd, Stowe 4:30 p.m. Sign Wave (Open Press) Intersection of Rt. 108 and 100, Stowe | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | Phil Scott for Governor, Glen Wright, Treasurer, 46 Three Mile Bridge Road, Middlesex, VT 05602 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: Jay Inslee
subject: Join me at a GOTV rally near you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Can you join me for an event near you? [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTgxNDQ5MAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDI4Mzc2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend -- In the midst of a frustrating election season, I find tremendous joy meeting with folks across Washington. While Republicans like Bill Bryant and Donald Trump have made this election about what divides us -- while they've painted a dark picture about our state and country's future -- Washingtonians know better. We know that together we're building a stronger economy and a better future for every Washington family. [**I love being on the trail -- talking with people like you. That 's why I hope you'll join me at a GOTV event near you! Find a nearby event over the next few days and please RSVP to let me know you can make it.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTgxNDQ5MAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDI4Mzc2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0) We'll talk about the progress we've made these past four years. We'll talk about our vision for the years to come. And we'll talk about what you can do to help us get over the finish line on Election Day. Our economy and our schools. Our climate and our public safety. So much is at stake this election year -- join us at an event near you and let's talk about the work yet ahead. Space is limited at these events, and they're filling up fast, so RSVP right away. [**JayInslee.com/Events**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTgxNDQ5MAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDI4Mzc2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Can't wait to see you out there there! name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: Deborah Ross needs us now >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74a7/24c69fd9/738ad4c/18ed1554/750083438/VEsH/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFCW06N_digital_email_20161103_Ross_n-all&source=WPEFCW06N_digital_email_20161103_Ross_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

The Senate race in North Carolina just took an ugly turn.

A few days ago, Republican Senator Richard Burr described walking into a gun shop and thinking that nothing made him feel better than seeing a magazine about rifles "with a picture of Hillary Clinton on the front of it." He added, "I was a little bit shocked... it didn't have a bullseye on it."

**[If you think this kind of language has NO PLACE in politics, then make a $3 donation right now to help our North Carolina Senate candidate, Deborah Ross, defeat Richard Burr.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74a7/24c69fd9/738ad4c/18ed1555/750083438/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/deborah-ross?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+If+you+think+this+kind+of+language+has+N&utm_campaign=WPEFCW06N_digital_email_20161103_Ross_n-all&source=WPEFCW06N_digital_email_20161103_Ross_n-all")**

100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign to help in these critical last few days.

This is the same sort of violent rhetoric we heard from Donald Trump earlier this year when he suggested that if Hillary wins, the "Second Amendment people" could stop her from appointing Supreme Court justices. Anyone who makes comments about violence against political opponents shouldn't be making decisions about the future of this country.

Right now Deborah Ross is neck-and-neck with Burr in the polls.

Deborah is doing all she can to defeat Burr, but she needs our help now. Republicans are rushing money in to try to bolster him, including millions from GOP super PACs, and we cannot let someone who speaks so cavalierly about violence win.

**Donate $3 now to help Deborah fight back and defeat Burr on Tuesday. 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Deborah-Today](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74a7/24c69fd9/738ad4c/18ed1556/750083438/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/deborah-ross?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpDeborahToday&utm_campaign=WPEFCW06N_digital_email_20161103_Ross_n-all&source=WPEFCW06N_digital_email_20161103_Ross_n-all")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74a7/24c69fd9/738ad4c/18ed1557/750083438/VEsC/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/deborah-ross?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFCW06N_digital_email_20161103_Ross_n-all&source=WPEFCW06N_digital_email_20161103_Ross_n-all")
